name: Web Policy Conformance Demo
summary: The runnable proof that the webpolicy DMN engine is conformant. The runtime (PolicyDecisionPoint + ProofChain) is relocated to Frontier UI (#1799, WE holds zero executable); its conformance runs through the plateau-hosted conformance runner (#1788/#1790) driving the WE-owned webpolicy vector suite (#1800: facts→verdict per hit policy + proof-chain checks) against the FUI binding. The pass/fail panel is rendered at plateau-origin inside a cross-origin iframe.
description:
Concept

The runnable proof that the webpolicy DMN engine is conformant. The runtime — the PolicyDecisionPoint and the proof-of-compliance ProofChain — is relocated to Frontier UI (#1799; WE holds zero executable, #1282). Its conformance runs through the plateau-hosted conformance runner (#1788 / #1790), which drives the WE webpolicy vector suite (#1800) against the FUI binding.

Verified contract

WE owns only the build-agnostic vectors and the PolicyRuleSet meta-schema (#406); the engine impl is FUI's, the runner is plateau's. The pass/fail panel is rendered at plateau-origin inside an iframe — the cross-origin boundary (#1788 ratified (b)) that reaches the shared, neutral runner with no implementer→runner edge. A green result proves conformance independent of how the engine is built (#899).
